name: cryptovault
description: Risk. Loot. Survive. Repeat. - A Play-to-Earn crypto dungeon crawler

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --workspace=client install && npm --workspace=server install
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=client & npm run dev --workspace=server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
